VCP Pipeline Conditions for 1/21/2026


Notice Text:

For Gas Day January 21, 2026, Valley Crossing Pipeline, LLC (VCP) has approved and scheduled nominations at each pipeline segment and meter station up to VCP's operational capacity. The following locations have been restricted due to consistently being below the minimum heating value per Valley Crossing Pipeline's (VCP) Statement of Operating Conditions (SOC).

VCP has scheduled and sealed receipt nominations from MR40832 - WHISTLER PIPELINE. No increases in receipts from MR40832 will be accepted.

Due to gas quality issues VCP has restricted receipt nominations to -0- from 45813 - NGPL (DEL 40813/REC 40814). No increases in receipts from MR45813 will be accepted.

Please contact your Operations Account Representative should you have any questions.


BackPrint

messages.content: You are a structured data extraction assistant. Extract information from HTML documents and return only valid JSON. Be precise and thorough.

Extract these fields from the HTML notice as JSON: - title: The main notice title/subject - noticeType: Type of notice (Maintenance, Capacity Constraint, Force Majeure, etc.) - status: Initiate, Supersede, or Cancel - postedDate: When notice was posted (ISO 8601) - effectiveDate: When notice takes effect (ISO 8601) - endDate: When notice expires (ISO 8601, null if none) - description: Main content/body of the notice (cleaned text, not HTML) - affectedLocations: List of affected locations/meters if mentioned - responseRequired: true if response is required, false otherwise Return ONLY valid JSON, no markdown or explanation.
